fields.name: Matthew Davis
fields.bio: A young and scrappy developer who learned a lot from his father about all things electronics. Now a team lead for a group of intelligent and passionent young developers while looking to earn his Master's.

fields.name: Tan Huynh
fields.bio: Hello, I am the backend team lead.I am currently a senior in university.

fields.name: Anmol Tadikonda
fields.bio: Hi, I’m Anmol! I’m a computer science student at San Francisco State University who’s always building and experimenting with new ideas. I enjoy working on projects that combine creativity with problem-solving, whether that’s designing algorithms, coding up tools, or just trying out something new to learn. Lately I’ve been working on a small autonomous car project with a 3D-printed chassis kind of like a mini self-driving car I’m building from the ground up using tensorflow on a raspberry pi. Outside of school, you’ll usually find me lifting, training Jiu Jitsu, or messing around with side projects that keep me curious. This project is one of those a mix of what I’m learning in class and what I’m interested in exploring on my own.

fields.name: Justine Tenorio
fields.bio: Senior Comp Sci Student @ SFSU with a strong background in C/C++, Lua, Java, Python and Linux. I enjoy working on hands-on projects with Raspberry Pi, Arduino, and 3D printing. Passionate low-level programming and embedded Linux systems, I'm always looking for more opportunities to expand my skillset and knowledge in order to be a more effective developer.

fields.name: Zainab Abbasi
fields.bio: Full-stack developer. Frontend lead of the project. Versatile in Computer Science. Pursuing AI.
